name_hi: आयुष्मान भारत - प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना
name_en: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare (National Health Authority)
summary_hi: गरीब परिवारों के लिए ₹5 लाख तक का मुफ्त इलाज - सरकारी और एम्पैनल्ड निजी अस्पतालों में।

chunks.text: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) is the world's largest publicly funded health assurance scheme. It provides a health cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization. Cashless treatment at empanelled public and private hospitals. Covers ~12 crore poor and vulnerable families (~55 crore beneficiaries) identified from SECC 2011 data. Saalana 5 lakh tak ka mufat ilaaj garib parivaron ke liye, sarkari aur private aspatalon mein.

PM-JAY eligibility is determined by the Socio-Economic Caste Census (SECC) 2011 database — no fresh enrolment required. Rural beneficiaries identified by deprivation criteria (D1-D7, like landless households, female-headed families with no adult male, etc.). Urban beneficiaries identified by occupational categories (rag-pickers, beggars, domestic workers, construction workers, etc.). Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or call 14555. Patrata SECC-2011 ke aankdon par adharit hai, naya naam nahin jodte. pmjay.gov.in par ja kar ya 14555 par call kar ke status check karein.

PM-JAY benefits: ₹5,00,000 per family per year, no cap on family size or age. Covers ~1,949 medical procedures across 27 specialties (cardiology, oncology, nephrology, etc.). Includes pre-hospitalization expenses for 3 days and post-hospitalization for 15 days, including diagnostics and medicines. 100% cashless and paperless at empanelled hospitals. Pre-existing diseases are covered from day one. Faayda: parivar ko saalana 5 lakh tak ka cashless ilaaj, 1949 medical procedures cover, purani bimari bhi pehle din se cover.

To avail PM-JAY treatment, present the Ayushman card (e-card) at the empanelled hospital. To obtain the card: Aadhaar card, ration card, and any government-issued photo ID. Eligibility is checked against SECC 2011 list. Kagazaat: Ayushman card, Aadhaar card, ration card. Agar Ayushman card nahin hai, aspatal mein Ayushman Mitra se sampark karke banwa sakte hain.

How to get Ayushman card under PM-JAY: (1) Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in (Am I eligible?) or call 14555. (2) Visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC), empanelled hospital, or Ayushman Mitra desk with Aadhaar. (3) Verification against SECC data. (4) Free Ayushman card (e-card) issued. (5) Use at any empanelled hospital across India for cashless treatment. Kaise apply karein: pmjay.gov.in par patrata jaanchen, CSC ya aspatal mein Ayushman Mitra se milein, Aadhaar dikhayein, free card banwayein.

PM-JAY coverage scope: Secondary and tertiary hospitalization only — OPD/outpatient is generally NOT covered (some state schemes add OPD). 1,949 packages covering surgeries (cardiac, ortho, cancer, etc.), ICU, neonatal care, mental health, dialysis, chemotherapy, dental, and emergency care. Treatment portable across India — beneficiary from Bihar can use card in Tamil Nadu. Janaa: PM-JAY mein sirf bharti hone wala ilaaj cover hota hai, OPD aam taur par cover nahin. 1949 packages mein cardiac, cancer, dialysis, surgery sab shamil.

PM-JAY 24x7 toll-free helpline: 14555 (national) or 1800-111-565. Website: pmjay.gov.in. Beneficiary portal: beneficiary.nha.gov.in. Find empanelled hospitals via hospitals.pmjay.gov.in. Madad ke liye 14555 par call karein.
